data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for auditability of tier at time of access.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding the auditability of the membership tier at the time of access. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or reads that directly address this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and resource management processes, but there is no specific evidence related to the auditability of tier access, indicating a lack of necessary evidence to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
gaps: No evidence of auditability of tier at time of access.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the auditability of tier at time of access.
